steps.title: Evaluate the function at the starting moment
steps.content: At the start of the project, $x = 0$. Evaluating the function $f(x) = 33 - 0.18x$: $$f(0) = 33 - 0.18(0) = 33$$ The height is 33 cm at the beginning.

steps.title: Determine what 33 represents in context
steps.content: Since 33 is the value of $f(x)$ when $x = 0$ (the start of the project), the number 33 represents the estimated height of the liquid at the start. That matches choice A — A is correct.
